message:
fix(core): replace fetch_max with fetch_add in now_micros() else branch

The previous fix (4a71727) replaced the load/store TOCTOU race with
fetch_max, but the else branch still had a subtle concurrency bug:
two threads entering the else branch simultaneously would both read
the same `prev`, both compute `prev + 1`, and both call
fetch_max(prev+1) — returning identical timestamps.

Replace with fetch_add(1, AcqRel) which is a single atomic
read-modify-write: each concurrent caller atomically increments the
high-water mark and receives a unique value. No two calls can ever
return the same timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
